for Antero ♡

a little collection of reasons and moments, just for you

hover over things to find them

bom diaaaa ☀️
Every morning, without fail. 'Dormiste bem?' — the best alarm clock in the world.

The spiral staircase. You lay down at the bottom like you'd fallen from the top and I have never laughed so hard.

Scotland, up north ♡
a memory
the night I said it
We were at your friend's birthday. I watched you move through the room and everyone was just so drawn to you. I felt so lucky to be there with you. The words burst out of me. I love you, Antero.
he makes music ♪
The fact that you listen deeply, play instruments, and do wild exciting things with music — it is genuinely one of the coolest things about you.
I never cook alone 🍝
You always offer to cook dinner. Always. It sounds small. It really isn't.
he picks me up 🚗
Whenever you can. Just showing up. That's love in action.
11:11 ✨
Every day my phone lights up and it's you. You turned a superstition into a ritual. Into something I look forward to more than I can say.

You posing with the Kylie Minogue prosecco like an absolute star. Those polaroids are treasures.

very sexy, very north ✦
so soft, so calm 🌿
The way you hold me when I need it. The way you make space without being asked. I don't take that for granted, ever.
♡
♡
♡
since 6 jan 2024 ♡
my favourite person
with all my love
you make space for me 💙
When I need to be held, you hold me. When I need room, you give it. You are calm in a way that makes me feel safe. That is not nothing. That is everything.
how we found each other
A little app. A little luck. And suddenly you. I'm so glad we found each other, Terito.
Scotland with you ⛰️
Our little trips up north are some of my most treasured memories. Cosy and silly and full of you.
more than anything
you are so enamoured with
I see how people light up around you. Everyone is drawn to you. And somehow I get to be the one who's yours. I feel like the luckiest person in any room we're both in.
music, together 🎵
That we both love music so deeply feels like a gift. It's something that's just ours.
♡
♡
Terito ♡
if you're having a bad day
I hope this reminds you how seen you are. How loved. Come find me — or just stay here a while. I made this place for you. ♡
